subtitle: 01 / GREETING
title: ANTHOLOGY
paragraphs: I draw because the physical line is absolute. Unlike digital renders, a black ink drawing cannot lie about its structure.

Anthology is a digital vault housing my structural, architectural, and brutalist ink specimens. These lines represent hours of physical tension, architectural drafts, and spatial exploration mapping out physical concepts into high-contrast voids.

This website serves as an archival register, logging vector data coordinates, material attributes, and volumetric densities. Treat each specimen not as a flat drawing, but as a monument in a speculative grid.
